description: CompositionPure leatherette shoulder bag in yellow with broad and soft shoulder straps, side straps, three separate chambers and dedicated zipper with smocked side panelsThis stylish bag is for the woman with a strong sense of style. This fashionable shoulder bag is oh-so-perfect for all ages and dresses! Stack all your essentials into it comfortably. With superior finish and a stylish smocking on the side panels, it’s definitely a head turner. And all along, the soft wide straps ensure it stays firm and comfortably on your shoulders while you indulge in a shopping spree.Bag careRub surface with dry clean cloth to remove dust and dirtUse a mild leather cleaner
